description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elecnix/ikiwiki Docker image and a global before_script installing git with apt-get and updating submodules (apt-get install -y git, git submodule init, git submodule update). Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job named "test" in the test stage that runs the command "ikiwiki --setup ikiwiki.setup --libdir themes/ikistrap/lib" and is triggered on any commit where $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME is not the default branch (rule: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH). Add a pages job named "pages" in the deploy stage that runs the same ikiwiki command, publishes the generated "public/" directory as a pages artifact, and only runs when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals the default branch (rule: $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH).
